artists.name: Nova Reyes
artists.bio: Visual artist working at the intersection of diaspora and digital memory.

artists.name: Echo Park
artists.bio: Sound designer and visual poet obsessed with urban decay and renewal.

artists.name: Soleil D.
artists.bio: Textile artist and muralist exploring identity through texture and scale.

nova-reyes.statement: My practice is an act of remembering for those who were not allowed to.
nova-reyes.process_notes: I shoot on film first, then digitally manipulate to introduce artifacts of memory.

echo-park.statement: Sound is the architecture of the invisible city.
echo-park.process_notes: Field recordings, synthesis, and found footage collapsed into single experiences.

soleil-d.statement: Fabric remembers the body that wore it.
